textByHash.ceae7bc441df18902f3e2ed48f773ddd1fe674f0: You! I bet you're with them!
textByHash.ec60af426d70cdeaae09546edd82fda867af23e1: Ah, I see. So you're going to play dumb are you? Well, be gone! I won't fall for your lies!
textByHash.bf3c0db3932c2ae40b502ab15daa4d1ddc03786e: Hey! I didn't say you could touch my farming patch, did I?
textByHash.1a59b6c9a60427ab5fba9b92738605bafc2b463b: Ah, I see. So you're going to play dumb are you? Well I won't fall for your lies!
textByHash.02f74136a88dd4ef4a7848d00ec0e791096c4337: It's those frogs on the other side of the oasis! They're out to get us! All of us! If someone doesn't kill them all, we'll be living our lives as their slaves!
textByHash.a2dd02874914bd2ae96ecd2bb138a080798d098a: You want to go near them? Well then you're a fool! I will watch from a safe distance as they dine on your corpse!
textByHash.d01e4abea47b9d276d70c04e2352d96b93c27161: That's it! You walk away! Just remember, I know the truth!
textByHash.451b553a9b0f4951060c87e1b4c59d4f45390401: You didn't go near those frogs yet, did you?
textByHash.efe2236807f8894585e4d1fccb32623d225895e1: I can tell. If you had, you'd be dead!
textByHash.2aba1a0ee79e579d7f935275a478d1da960e6c94: The frogs didn't kill you? This is unexpected.
textByHash.38246da7ae33aa0c4eef57404faa490f43dd5da5: Peace? The hypocrisy! After everything they've done they think peace is an option? Absolutely not!
textByHash.4449c2e0b04dc01e7e4c528c68720dc3b5953c9c: Look, I can't remember. But they must have done something!
textByHash.7d69818fb0586002ce5514f3d5a7f1988863eb2f: They must have taken my brain! That's why I can't remember! You tell them I want my brain back!
textByHash.dac25d19904294f3c908cf8843495999c7854d74: Negotiate? I don't negotiate with monsters!
textByHash.c489873ccb0e2451ec3a80214f2888c72bb7d41f: Well do they have a leader?
textByHash.08c9fce286103df442876aa3eda3a3b963cd93b8: Well you go tell them that I'll only negotiate with their leader.
textByHash.aec5451b1da4e24d69b633c00a3ecd6942053ded: I'm only going to negotiate with the leader of those monsters. You go tell them that!
textByHash.ea34be1d5d18918e0773731f5a96b4882f3e47c4: Have you found the leader of those frogs? I'm only going to negotiate with the leader!
textByHash.bf54bd07e432839b4029a7bcc1ec89541f1d5b2d: Flies? But what have the flies done wrong?
textByHash.4c7a95828b1175fd6cfc1fc91743e430df2eed11: Yes, but so did my brother, and I never wanted him dead. What else have the flies been doing?
textByHash.31b337663924ced35ca89e571b4a47ca1822a28f: The flies are out to get me? Is it really true?
textByHash.e03b3be9478cda605b780fdc5ad6af2dc39475e3: Not yet. First I must see proof of this horrific betrayal by the flies. Find this proof for me, and I will agree to the deal.
textByHash.d5d34076a5f5d46582ba8e6e4046f10b1edf6181: You're back. Do you have the proof?
textByHash.f352231597ba4617cd18656a61ca265115d2c806: Then return to me once you have it.
textByHash.9c91d4e25b62d1b43aba09cc74c7b5d4b1c89784: It cannot be?! Wait here! I must check at once!
textByHash.b157f7a73da3f993d198f9b120b16568659f60bb: I see my worst fears have come to pass. This is dark day not just for me, but for all of humanity.
textByHash.2c453edbd27bce80f567910b1f9bfccbf50db6d5: Return to the frogs. Tell them we have a deal.
textByHash.5e077d7a96643dc66ef1a0493b9f6ac55748ad61: Leave me. I need time to contemplate this great loss. Return to the frogs. Tell them we have a deal.
textByHash.cf3a21d90bffc995abea37cfd48662edb76fc033: Hello again. You helped forge my alliance with the frogs against those disgusting flies. Please feel free to use my farming patch in return. It's the least I can do.
